from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import serialization
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.serialization import pkcs12
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.asymmetric import ec
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import hashes

perCve.safeFixture:
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import serialization
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.serialization import pkcs12
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives.asymmetric import ec
from cryptography.hazmat.primitives import hashes

key = ec.generate_private_key(ec.SECP256R1())
cert = key.public_key().public_bytes(serialization.Encoding.PEM, serialization.PublicFormat.SubjectPublicKeyInfo)

# Safe: no hmac_hash override
encryption = serialization.PrivateFormat.PKCS12.encryption_builder().build(b"password")

pkcs12.serialize_key_and_certificates(b"name", key, cert, [], encryption)

perCve.vulnerableFixture:
class ApplicationController < ActionController::Base
  def index
    response.body = lambda { |body|
      ActiveSupport::Reloader.run!
      body.each { |part| render html: part }

end
perCve.safeFixture:
class ApplicationController < ActionController::Base
  def index
    response.body = lambda { |body|
      ActiveSupport::Reloader.run!(reset: true)
      ''.freeze
    }
  end
end
